title: Egyptian Lentil Curry
description: A flavorful and comforting curry featuring lentils and spices, inspired by Egyptian cuisine.

ingredients.name: egyptian spices
ingredients.notes: a mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Sauté the onion and garlic until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry powder and egyptian spices, cook for 1 minute.
Add the lentils, coconut milk, water, and salt (if using).
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered.
Cook for 20-25 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Season with additional salt and spices to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs (optional).
